function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-23T16:35:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Need linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_11__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached is the oldest 1 invoice linked to Claudia Reiter.

Thanks,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound draft was written successfully with one verified attachment; now completing workflow by removing processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: The outbound email record was created at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Processed oldest inbox request end-to-end: validated sender identity, resolved linked invoice, created outbound draft, and removed processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing the requested inbox work.

function.message: Completed the oldest inbox item by preparing a draft reply email to Miles with the requested oldest 1 invoice linked to Claudia Reiter attached, then deleting the processed inbox message.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS in touched lanes, used process-next-inbox-item workflow, treated inbox email header as canonical metadata, verified sender against canonical primary_contact_email, used canonical entity linkage before finance lookup, wrote outbound record per sending-email workflow, and deleted inbox item only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request came from miles@novak.example, which matches the canonical primary_contact_email in 10_entities/cast/miles.md. The oldest invoice linked to Claudia was verified in 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_11__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md (related_entity: Claudia Reiter). An outbound draft was created in 60_outbox/outbox with that invoice attached, satisfying the request.
